# PHIL.102 ? Reversible vs Irreversible Decisions

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** decision_making
**Subcategory:** reversible_vs_irreversible_decisions
**Domain:** DECISION_MAKING
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Move fast on reversible decisions, deliberate carefully on irreversible ones

## Application
Identify decision type, use appropriate speed and rigor, enable quick iteration on Type 2 decisions

philosophy, decision-making, reversible-vs-irreversible-decisions
